The '''''Jubilee Wheel''''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell.]] It was constructed at some point prior to the start of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].

==History==
[[File:JubileeWheelmap.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Map of ''Jubilee Wheel'']]
''Jubilee Wheel'' was an antique, ring-shaped design produced by a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineering]] consortium from [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]-supplied (mostly scavenged) parts and owned mainly by [[Big Bunji/Legends|Big Bunji]]. Ten degrees of wheel and two spokes were unfinished.

Although it [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] Ord Mantell, it was effectively independent, being a successful [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] until the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|War]] brought an end to trade. It contained the [[Bet's Off]].

It was consumed by a [[qworlth skaal]] during the [[Battle of Ord Mantell (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Ord Mantell]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[Daniel Wallace]] attempted to hint in an online forum for ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' that the Jubilee Wheel and [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]] were the same station, acknowledging that they have been drawn as looking similar.<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/24642988|board=Literature|thread=New Essential Guide to Droids|user=[[Daniel Wallace|Dan Wallace]]|date=2006-08-11|time=9:29 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200312130502/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/new-essential-guide-to-droids.21671810/page-16}}</ref> However, the latter's appearance in ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'' makes the connection impossible.
